hooks.command: command -v bwoc >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ -e .bwoc/agents.toml -o -n "$BWOC_WORKSPACE" ] && echo "BWOC fleet available — $(bwoc list --count 2>/dev/null || echo '?') agents. Use /bwoc:list, /bwoc:status, /bwoc:send, /bwoc:run, /bwoc:team, /bwoc:task, /bwoc:memory, or the bwoc-fleet skill." || true
